@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0


class Sensor {
    TypesOfSensors: List<string>
    TypesOfSignal: List<string>
    TypeOfSensor: string
    TypeOfSignal: string
    
}

Component <|-- Actuator 
Actuator : +TypesOfActuators: List<String>\n+StatusesofActuators:List<String>\nTypeOfAcutator:string\nstatusOFactuatior:String\ndateTime() \ngetFunction()\ncomponent(id,name,date,type,status) 

Component<|.. IComponent 


IComponent --> ComponentStore  
Proxy --* Program   
Program .. Proxy  

Class "C" Component{
id:int
name:string
date:DateTime
dateTime():string
Getfunction()}



sensor--o componentContext{}
Actuator - o- componentcontext {}
proxy-->icomponent
program-> proxy
componentstore -> program
component context <-- component store




@enduml
